_comment: Regression anchor for Phase 3 Transform validation. Represents the expected output for Example-1 (the composite value slide) from the Contentful Personalization Modular Field Deck. Transform output must match this shape before scaling beyond one slide. Fields match the deployed corrected model: native proves/illustrates/contains refs; no status (native publish state gates retrieval); no provenanceClass (deferred to production); subtype carries provenance role where needed.

sourceDocument.title: Contentful Personalization — Modular Field Deck Q2FY27

atoms.body: Deliver relevant experiences that convert, without leaving Contentful
atoms.semanticSummary: The overarching promise: deliver relevant, converting experiences without leaving the CMS.

atoms.body: Convert more visitors into customers — build audience segments and content variants that drive higher CTR and conversions
atoms.semanticSummary: Personalization lifts CTR and conversion via audience segments and content variants.

atoms.body: Your first-party data, finally working for you — define segments with any customer data by connecting CRM, CDP, or warehouse signals directly to content decisions
atoms.semanticSummary: Activates first-party data (CRM/CDP/DWH) directly into content decisions.

atoms.body: Built into your flow of work — personalize in the same Contentful workspace. No new tools, no dev tickets, no stitching
atoms.semanticSummary: Personalization is native to Contentful with no new tools or developer dependency.

atoms.body: Let AI surface what you would never find — AI is grounded in your actual content model and customer data, so suggestions are contextually accurate from day one
atoms.semanticSummary: AI suggestions are grounded in the customer's own content model and data, accurate from day one.

atoms.body: 78% increase in conversion rate by Kraft Heinz
atoms.semanticSummary: Kraft Heinz saw a 78% increase in conversion rate with Contentful Personalization.
Ace & Tate saw 87% higher click-through rate with Contentful Personalization.

atoms.body: Under 30 minutes for Ruggable to personalize experiences
atoms.semanticSummary: Ruggable was personalizing experiences in under 30 minutes (fast time-to-value).
Screenshot of the Contentful Experiments dashboard listing experiments with status, audience, and performance metrics.

reviewQueue.reason: Confirm actual slide index in deck for all atoms
